sql.monthly_amount_by_type: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.date)::date AS trans_month, t.type AS transaction_type, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount FROM trans t WHERE t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.ksymbol_share: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(t.k_symbol, ''), '(blank)') AS k_symbol, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS transaction_count FROM trans t WHERE t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY transaction_count DESC;
sql.monthly_avg_balance: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.date)::date AS trans_month, AVG(t.balance) AS avg_post_transaction_balance FROM trans t WHERE t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

chart_spec.layout_intent: transaction mix overview with stacked amount, purpose mix, and balance trend
